EmailTemplate.name: AN - Referee invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Would you be willing to provide a reference?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE'D LOVE YOUR INPUT.
Hi {!b3o__Reference__c.b3o__First_Name_Referee__c},
{!b3o__Reference__c.Candidate_Name__c} has applied for a role with Alliance Nursing, and you've been nominated as their reference. We’d value your input on their character, performance, and how well they might suit this role.
PROVIDE REFERENCE
If you have any questions or need further information, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
Thank you for your time and assistance in helping us make an informed decision.
Kind regards, Alliance Nursing, Recruitment
